user_query: I'm starting a new fitness program and I need to calculate my body fat percentage. My height is 170cm, weight is 70kg, waist is 80cm, neck is 40cm, hip is 90cm, and age is 28. Additionally, fetch the schedule for NBA games on my birthday, which is on October 15th.

TaskList.description: Calculate body fat percentage based on the given parameters (height, weight, waist, neck, hip, age).
Fetch the schedule for NBA games that are scheduled on October 15th.
